member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The underlying handlers pool to decorate.

member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering Telegrator OpenTelemetry instrumentation.

member.summary: Adds OpenTelemetry metrics and tracing instrumentation for the Telegrator framework. Decorates , , and .

member.summary: Decorates an with OpenTelemetry tracing and metrics.

member.summary: Provides instances for distributed tracing of Telegram bot operations.

member.summary: Provides instruments for Telegrator runtime metrics.

member.name: P:Telegrator.OpenTelemetry.TelegratorMetrics.UpdatesReceived
member.summary: Counter of incoming updates received by the bot.

member.name: P:Telegrator.OpenTelemetry.TelegratorMetrics.HandlerDuration
member.summary: Histogram of handler execution duration in milliseconds.
